$comment: Opt-in curated Claude Code permission baseline for this repository. See docs/idd-policy.md before adopting it. This baseline deliberately excludes merge-capable operations by default: no `gh pr merge` allow, even though docs/idd-policy.md#merge-policy records `fully_autonomous_merge` -- add it yourself only after a deliberate decision to do so, not as a side effect of importing this file. This repository has no `scripts/` or `bin/` directory, so the upstream `node scripts/*` / `node bin/*` allow (and its paired merge-execute deny guard, which only makes sense alongside that allow) is replaced here with allow entries for this repository's own validation commands instead. `gh api` is deliberately NOT allowlisted here at all -- it can reach destructive endpoints (e.g. issue/comment/label deletion) that no single Bash pattern can safely allow-list; review any `gh api` call before adding one. Personal additions belong in .claude/settings.local.json, which layers on top of this file.
